# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build & Deploy 

on: 
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
      - name: Run custom build scripts
        run: |
          chmod +x ./scripts/* #Makes the files executable
          ./scripts/*           #Runs all executable files in the directory
        
      - name: Deploy 
        run: |
          echo ${{ secrets.DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND }} | sh    #Run deployment command from secrets
